title: space_delete/space_update: two-query existence+role check has TOCTOU gap
description: daemon/src/jmap.rs lines 1245-1277 (update) and 1380-1411 (delete): space_exists() then get_space_member_role() are two separate queries. A concurrent delete between them causes get_space_member_role() to return Ok(None), mapped to 'forbidden' instead of the correct 'notFound', leaking space existence to the caller. Fix: combine into a single query joining space and space_member, distinguishing 'space not found' from 'not a member' at the SQL level.
